title: Grand Nest
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''Grand Nest''' was a main nest in a clearing on [[Cona/Legends|Cona]] around which [[Arcona/Legends|Arcona]] built their own nests, and the social center of the culture. Arcona never built a family nest more than 20 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] away from the Grand Nest. Meetings in the Grand Nest were held every twenty [[Local day/Legends|days]] and were led by a [[Nest Leader]], who was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] Arconan chosen by popular vote to lead.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Knights of the Fallen Empire]]''
